comments.160F:018A: test bit 0x03: call main_movement every 4th iteration
comments.160F:553C: jnz: if state!=0 keep si=1 (player mode)
comments.160F:553F: cmp player_active [0x1673], 0 — ROOT CAUSE: always 0 in attract mode
comments.160F:5544: jz: [0x1673]==0 → si stays 0 (attract mode, player input ignored)
comments.160F:555C: cmp elapsed vs threshold [di+0x59F2]: di=0→3 ticks (attract), di=2→player speed
comments.160F:5560: jnb: elapsed >= threshold → proceed with scroll
comments.160F:5562: ret: not enough time elapsed, skip this frame
comments.160F:1B7F: jnz: if state!=0 skip attract mode check
comments.160F:1B88: jz: return immediately — [0x1673]==0, still in attract mode
comments.160F:14B3: IRQ1 handler: reads scan code from port 0x60, updates key state table
